brandStory.heading:
From Raw Wood
Into Works of Value
brandStory.p1: every piece of wood has a story. We believe that wood is not merely a material, but a part of nature that deserves to be cherished and crafted with full care and precision.
brandStory.p2: Every product is handmade by experienced local Indonesian artisans. From wood selection, cutting, to finishing — everything is done with great detail and dedication to produce pieces that are not only beautiful, but also durable.
brandStory.p3: We are also committed to using certified legal wood and food-grade finishing materials, so that every product is not only aesthetic but also eco-friendly and safe to use.

featuredProducts.heading: Our Products
featuredProducts.subheading: Our best-selling collection most loved by customers.

products.heading: Product Catalog
products.subheading: Explore a wide range of wooden kitchen utensils that are safe, durable, and beautiful.

about.heading: About Us
about.p1: Lignum Studio is dedicated to empowering local craftsmen while preserving Indonesia's traditional wood craft heritage. All products are crafted through a meticulous handmade process, using certified premium solid wood, and finished with natural food-grade materials making them safe for collecting or displaying.
about.vision_p: Lignum Studio is dedicated to empowering local craftsmen while preserving Indonesia's traditional wood craft heritage. All products are crafted through a meticulous handmade process, using certified premium solid wood, and finished with natural food-grade materials making them safe for collecting or displaying.
about.why_subheading: We bring more than just products. Every piece carries value, quality, and a story.
